Requirement: The three databases shall be related hierarchically: Projects → Focus Tasks → Pomodoro Sessions, so that data rolls up automatically from sessions to tasks to projects
Focus Tasks DB — Days Overdue: Formula field. Calculated as today() minus Originally Scheduled, where Scheduled Date is before today and Status is not Done
The 'Reschedule to Today' button shall not modify the Originally Scheduled field, preserving the original date for overdue tracking
The Projects DB shall act as a top-level container for all work, allowing tasks and pomodoro stats to be viewed and compared at the project level
Functional Requirements: N-FR-04 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-04-366da49ee112817f9ca0d89c5da48d60?pvs=21), N-FR-05 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-05-366da49ee11281bebc7afa72603890cf?pvs=21), N-FR-06 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-06-366da49ee112817da63fe72b15425b27?pvs=21), N-FR-07 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-07-366da49ee11281a499ecce64f88b21c1?pvs=21), N-FR-08 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-08-366da49ee112814c8c1eeb32f4bc862d?pvs=21), N-FR-09 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-09-366da49ee11281cb9f98d8c1f30bf27d?pvs=21), N-FR-10 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-10-366da49ee11281f8a4d0c1d4c014f0f2?pvs=21), N-FR-11 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-11-366da49ee1128156ab24c7ddce933992?pvs=21)

Requirement: Pomodoro Sessions DB — Completed: Checkbox field. True if timer ran to completion; false if session was abandoned early.
Focus Tasks DB — Actual: Rollup field. Count of completed focus sessions linked to this task. Auto-calculated from Pomodoro Sessions DB.
Focus Tasks DB — Priority: Select field. Options: P1 / P2 / P3
Focus Tasks DB — Due Date: Date field. Hard deadline if applicable. Separate from Scheduled Date.
Pomodoro Sessions DB — Project: Rollup from Task relation. Allows filtering sessions by project without extra steps.
Projects DB — Total Pomodoros: Rollup field. Count of completed focus sessions rolled up from Focus Tasks
The system shall create a relation property on the Focus Tasks DB linking each task to exactly one Project
Each Focus Task row shall have a Notion button property labelled 'Reschedule to Today' that sets Scheduled Date to the current date
Projects DB — Notes: Rich text field. Freetext context for the project
Pomodoro Sessions DB — Type: Select field. Options: Focus / Short Break / Long Break / Planning
When starting a pomodoro, the app shall present only actionable tasks — those scheduled for today or overdue — rather than the full backlog
Pomodoro Sessions DB — Start Time: Date field with time. Session start timestamp.
Pomodoro Sessions DB — Interruptions: Number field. Count of interruptions logged during the session
Projects shall be categorised by Area to allow filtering across domains of life (e.g. Work, Personal, Learning)
Focus Tasks DB — Originally Scheduled: Date field. Set once when Scheduled Date is first assigned. Never updated on reschedule. Used to calculate days overdue.
Focus Tasks DB — Completed Date: Date field. Set automatically when Status transitions to Done
Pomodoro Sessions DB — End Time: Date field with time. Session end timestamp.
Pomodoro Sessions DB — Name: Title field. Auto-generated by the app, e.g. '2026-05-20 · Focus · Session 3'
The user shall never need to manually update the Pomodoro Sessions database — the app writes to it automatically
Functional Requirements: N-FR-30 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-30-366da49ee1128177a3d2dd2fddd95f87?pvs=21), N-FR-31 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-31-366da49ee11281fb9825fc60ad8893f4?pvs=21), N-FR-32 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-32-366da49ee112813d8b09d47196b924c5?pvs=21), N-FR-33 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-33-366da49ee11281d99afbc2f3478a35db?pvs=21), N-FR-34 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-34-366da49ee112815d911ee2ebf7f4c10f?pvs=21), N-FR-35 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-35-366da49ee1128176b815cbff7c8465ed?pvs=21), N-FR-36 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-36-366da49ee11281d79720fa0e6c84b979?pvs=21), N-FR-37 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-37-366da49ee112815787d9d4f506a6fe9b?pvs=21), N-FR-38 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-38-366da49ee11281809345ead490f89a83?pvs=21), N-FR-39 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-39-366da49ee112811e929ec579db1a6a18?pvs=21), N-FR-40 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-40-366da49ee11281688bd9d33ed6e73f3e?pvs=21), N-FR-44 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-44-366da49ee11281eab6b6c10fe358573c?pvs=21)

Requirement: The Pomodoro Sessions DB shall act as an append-only event log, written to automatically by the app at the end of every session
Functional Requirements: N-FR-30 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-30-366da49ee1128177a3d2dd2fddd95f87?pvs=21), N-FR-31 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-31-366da49ee11281fb9825fc60ad8893f4?pvs=21), N-FR-32 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-32-366da49ee112813d8b09d47196b924c5?pvs=21), N-FR-33 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-33-366da49ee11281d99afbc2f3478a35db?pvs=21), N-FR-34 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-34-366da49ee112815d911ee2ebf7f4c10f?pvs=21), N-FR-35 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-35-366da49ee1128176b815cbff7c8465ed?pvs=21), N-FR-36 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-36-366da49ee11281d79720fa0e6c84b979?pvs=21), N-FR-37 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-37-366da49ee112815787d9d4f506a6fe9b?pvs=21), N-FR-38 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-38-366da49ee11281809345ead490f89a83?pvs=21), N-FR-39 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-39-366da49ee112811e929ec579db1a6a18?pvs=21), N-FR-40 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-40-366da49ee11281688bd9d33ed6e73f3e?pvs=21)

Requirement: Projects DB — Area: Select field. No pre-populated options — user adds their own (e.g. Work, Personal, Learning, Health)
Projects DB — Name: Title field. The project name.
Pomodoro Sessions DB — Cycle Number: Number field. Which pomodoro in the current 4-cycle block (1-4). Null for breaks and planning sessions.
The app shall support a Planning Session mode — a distinct, time-boxed session for reviewing and scheduling tasks for the day — separate from the focus/break cycle
The Focus Tasks DB shall track both the user's estimated and actual pomodoro count per task, enabling improvement of estimation accuracy over time
The app shall use Notion as its persistent data store, organised across three linked databases: Projects, Focus Tasks, and Pomodoro Sessions

The Focus Tasks DB header shall include a button labelled 'Reschedule All Overdue' that bulk-sets Scheduled Date to today for all tasks where Scheduled Date is before today and Status is not Done. No confirmation required.
Focus Tasks DB — Scheduled Date: Date field. Nullable — null means Backlog. Tasks where Scheduled Date is on or before today and not Done are surfaced as active in the app
Focus Tasks DB — Created: Created Time field. Auto-populated by Notion
Projects DB — Color / Icon: Icon and Cover properties for visual scanning in dashboard views
Focus Tasks DB — Type: Select field. Options: Deep Work / Admin / Communication / Creative / Research
The Notion dashboard shall provide two views: a Daily view for in-session use and a Weekly/Project view for end-of-week review
Functional Requirements: N-FR-51 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-51-366da49ee1128177ae59ebc1efbef22f?pvs=21), N-FR-52 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-52-366da49ee11281d78fa5e98f5a740f63?pvs=21), N-FR-53 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-53-366da49ee1128128882ed6ad9fdcd088?pvs=21), N-FR-53a (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-53a-366da49ee11281e7bd7ec7fb57ab7975?pvs=21), N-FR-54 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-54-366da49ee11281e58075ddbe63c0c802?pvs=21), N-FR-55 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-55-366da49ee112812a9ec8f88c144880fb?pvs=21), N-FR-56 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-56-366da49ee1128167b990d99a8ed7dbfe?pvs=21), N-FR-57 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-57-366da49ee11281869969d3349cfee342?pvs=21), N-FR-58 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-58-366da49ee11281d9bf97fbbe4ebd5539?pvs=21), N-FR-59 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-59-366da49ee11281b68450dd4216084f05?pvs=21)

Requirement: Tasks with a Scheduled Date in the future shall be valid and stored, but shall not be surfaced in the app's task picker until their scheduled date arrives
Planning sessions shall not count toward the user's daily pomodoro total, as they represent organisation time rather than focused work
Projects DB — Status: Select field. Options: Active / On Hold / Completed / Archived
The dashboard shall surface statistics that support self-improvement, not just vanity counts
Functional Requirements: N-FR-53a (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-53a-366da49ee11281e7bd7ec7fb57ab7975?pvs=21), N-FR-55 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-55-366da49ee112812a9ec8f88c144880fb?pvs=21), N-FR-56 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-56-366da49ee1128167b990d99a8ed7dbfe?pvs=21), N-FR-57 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-57-366da49ee11281869969d3349cfee342?pvs=21), N-FR-58 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-58-366da49ee11281d9bf97fbbe4ebd5539?pvs=21), N-FR-59 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-59-366da49ee11281b68450dd4216084f05?pvs=21)

Requirement: The app shall read user-configurable goal settings from a dedicated Config page in Notion, so that preferences can be updated in Notion without changing anything in the app
Functional Requirements: N-FR-60 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-60-366da49ee11281db99b2e4af566c9721?pvs=21), N-FR-61 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-61-366da49ee11281229e3df1f2ca8649d3?pvs=21), N-FR-62 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-62-366da49ee112816a8153ce07c9304889?pvs=21), N-FR-63 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-63-366da49ee112810ba500c801a3e88d01?pvs=21), N-FR-64 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-64-366da49ee112819983dde5077f3e8b1a?pvs=21), N-FR-53a (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-53a-366da49ee11281e7bd7ec7fb57ab7975?pvs=21)

Requirement: Projects DB — Target Pomodoros: Number field. Optional effort goal for the project
Focus Tasks DB — Name: Title field. The task name.
Focus Tasks DB — Estimate: Number field. User's expected pomodoro count for this task
Pomodoro Sessions DB — Duration (mins): Formula field. End Time minus Start Time in minutes.
Pomodoro Sessions DB — Date: Date field. Date of session (date only, not datetime)
Overdue tasks shall be visually distinguished from today's tasks in the picker, so the user can make an informed prioritisation decision
Session records shall contain enough data to power all dashboard statistics without requiring additional manual input from the user
Functional Requirements: N-FR-33 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-33-366da49ee11281d99afbc2f3478a35db?pvs=21), N-FR-34 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-34-366da49ee112815d911ee2ebf7f4c10f?pvs=21), N-FR-35 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-35-366da49ee1128176b815cbff7c8465ed?pvs=21), N-FR-36 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-36-366da49ee11281d79720fa0e6c84b979?pvs=21), N-FR-37 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-37-366da49ee112815787d9d4f506a6fe9b?pvs=21), N-FR-38 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-38-366da49ee11281809345ead490f89a83?pvs=21), N-FR-39 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-39-366da49ee112811e929ec579db1a6a18?pvs=21)

Requirement: The system shall expose rollup properties so that Actual Pomodoros on a task auto-calculates from its linked sessions, and Total Pomodoros on a project auto-calculates from its linked tasks
Focus Tasks DB — Notes / Context: Rich text field. Where the user left off and what to pick up next session
The system shall create a relation property on the Pomodoro Sessions DB linking each session to exactly one Focus Task
Focus Tasks DB — Project: Relation to Projects DB. Required on every task.
The Focus Tasks DB shall be the primary list of work the user intends to do, organised by project and schedulable to specific dates
Functional Requirements: N-FR-12 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-12-366da49ee11281cca0d3f6ac03c5000c?pvs=21), N-FR-13 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-13-366da49ee11281f2a78ef06754578543?pvs=21), N-FR-14 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-14-366da49ee11281f9bef5fc3385a59667?pvs=21), N-FR-18 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-18-366da49ee11281279015e48d179621a7?pvs=21), N-FR-21 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-21-366da49ee11281a59757c79f4406adf3?pvs=21), N-FR-22 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-22-366da49ee1128131bf2ce52434dc42ee?pvs=21), N-FR-23 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-23-366da49ee11281e18cddd3c079e24d4a?pvs=21), N-FR-24 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-24-366da49ee112819d88bffd2cedbda0ce?pvs=21), N-FR-25 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-25-366da49ee11281729d3af9e82d191c82?pvs=21)

Requirement: Tasks shall be schedulable to a specific date rather than a status bucket, so that unfinished tasks automatically become overdue without manual intervention
Functional Requirements: N-FR-14 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-14-366da49ee11281f9bef5fc3385a59667?pvs=21), N-FR-15 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-15-366da49ee112819d8489d1041cf11f9b?pvs=21), N-FR-16 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-16-366da49ee1128170a7e5e6f6c0b428db?pvs=21), N-FR-17 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-17-366da49ee112811c87cffaf75fc75a50?pvs=21), N-FR-26 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-26-366da49ee112814f8acacf9b360f08e9?pvs=21), N-FR-27 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-27-366da49ee112811cb6ccc487cd9e0c75?pvs=21), N-FR-28 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-28-366da49ee112819c8351f14100f6e69a?pvs=21), N-FR-29 (https://www.notion.so/N-FR-29-366da49ee11281b098ffefa30fc5f881?pvs=21)

Requirement: Projects DB — Due Date: Date field. Optional project deadline
Focus Tasks DB — Status: Select field. Options: Unscheduled / Scheduled / Done / Abandoned
Pomodoro Sessions DB — Task: Relation to Focus Tasks DB. Null for break sessions.
The app shall run the planning session timer only — it shall not open Notion or any external app automatically when the session begins
The app shall read the Config page on launch and cache the values for the session
Config page — Daily Pomodoro Goal: Number property. Default: 8. Target focus pomodoros per day.
Daily Dashboard: show count of focus pomodoros completed today (Sessions DB: Type = Focus, Completed = true, Date = today)
Weekly Dashboard: show total pomodoros per project for the current week
Planning sessions shall be excluded from all pomodoro count statistics on the dashboard
The app shall expose a 'Plan My Day' button in the menu bar that initiates a Planning Session
Tasks shall be ordered in the picker: overdue tasks first (oldest first), then today's tasks ordered by Priority (P1 → P3)
The task picker shall query Focus Tasks DB for records where: Scheduled Date is on or before today AND Status is not Done AND Status is not Abandoned
Weekly Dashboard: show tasks completed this week vs tasks added this week
Config page — Daily Session Goal: Number property. Default: 2. Target complete focus/break cycles per day.
Overdue tasks shall display a label showing the number of days overdue (e.g. '3 days overdue'), derived from the Days Overdue formula field
Daily Dashboard: show all tasks where Scheduled Date = today and Status = Scheduled
Weekly Dashboard: show estimate accuracy — average difference between Estimate and Actual across tasks completed this week
The picker shall provide an option to browse the full backlog (Unscheduled tasks) for cases where the user wants to pull in additional work
Changes to the Config page in Notion shall take effect the next time the app is launched or reloaded
The planning session timer shall default to 10 minutes
Weekly Dashboard: show session completion rate — percentage of started focus sessions that ran to completion this week
Daily Dashboard: show all tasks where Scheduled Date is before today and Status is not Done, with days overdue visible
Weekly Dashboard: show the user's current streak — consecutive days with at least one completed focus pomodoro
The Notion workspace shall contain a Config page with user-configurable properties readable by the app
When a task is selected and the session ends, the app shall prompt the user to mark the task as Done or leave it Scheduled for a future session
Daily Dashboard: show today's session log in chronological order
Daily Dashboard: show progress toward the daily goal in the format 'X of Y pomodoros / X of Y sessions'
The app shall write a session record to the Pomodoro Sessions DB with Type = Planning when a planning session ends
